content: By integrating a 2025 episodic memory transformer architecture into the OpenClaw ACP agent harness framework, we can create a self-improving distributed multi-agent system where agents continuously record, retrieve, and refine their own framework management and extension code from past development episodes. This allows the OpenClaw ecosystem to evolve its own core architecture over time by drawing on accumulated development experience stored in the episodic memory transformer.
source_topics: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
trigger_topic: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
